# Study Overview
Instrument name: PROM-E2E.
Instrument version: 1.0.
Subscale: Total.
Construct: Health-related quality of life.
Target population: Adults with chronic low back pain.
Language: English.
Country: USA.
Study design: cross-sectional validation study.
Total sample size: N = 120.
Measurement properties assessed: structural validity, internal consistency, reliability.

# Psychometric Results
Cronbach's alpha = 0.84.
ICC(2,1)=0.82.
weighted kappa: 0.74.
CFI = 0.96; TLI = 0.95; RMSEA = 0.05; SRMR = 0.06.
